creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Diagnosing the error you're getting can be difficult, it could also be caused by changes happened in your VoIP providers, or even network providers.

Have you had a look at the line of code pointed by the error? if any change has happened there or lines related to that?


Also, to understand if this is a regression from a previous asterisk or pjsip version the only way to check is to try to reproduce the problem after downgrading.
